name: GetTemplateFile
description: Method that specifies the template to use when creating a file.

parameters.Description: Input constant that specifies the type of to create.
parameters.Name: DocumentType

parameters.Description:
Input constant that specifies the system of measure to use in the drawing being created.



This is an optional argument whose default value is 8961.
parameters.Name: SystemOfMeasure

parameters.Description:
Input constant that specifies the drafting standard to use in the drawing being created.



This is an optional argument whose default value is 9729.
parameters.Name: DraftingStandard

parameters.Description:
Input constant (GUID) that specifies the subtype of the document to be created (sheet metal or weldment).

This is an optional argument whose default value is null.
parameters.Name: DocumentSubType

name: CreateMatrix
description: Method that creates a new 4x4 Matrix object. The matrix is initialized with an identity matrix.

parameters.Description:
Input Double that specifies the point's X-coordinate.

This is an optional argument whose default value is 0.0.
parameters.Name: XCoord

parameters.Description:
Input Double that specifies the Point's Y-coordinate.

This is an optional argument whose default value is 0.0.
parameters.Name: YCoord

parameters.Description:
Input Double that specifies the point's Z-coordinate.

This is an optional argument whose default value is 0.0.
parameters.Name: ZCoord

parameters.Description:
Input Double that specifies the point's X-coordinate.

This is an optional argument whose default value is 0.0.
parameters.Name: XCoord

parameters.Description:
Input Double that specifies the Point's Y-coordinate.

This is an optional argument whose default value is 0.0.
parameters.Name: YCoord

name: CreateVector

parameters.Description:
Input Double that specifies the Vector's X-coordinate.

This is an optional argument whose default value is 0.0.
parameters.Name: XCoord

parameters.Description:
Input Double that specifies the Vector's Y-coordinate.

This is an optional argument whose default value is 0.0.
parameters.Name: YCoord

parameters.Description:
Input Double that specifies the Vector's Z-coordinate.

This is an optional argument whose default value is 0.0.
parameters.Name: ZCoord

name: XYPlane
description: Property that returns the work plane that represents the X-Y plane of the coordinate system.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a WorkPlane.

name: CreateDefinition
description: Method that creates a new UserCoordinateSystemDefinition object.

name: Profiles
description: Property that returns the Profiles collection object.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a Profiles.

name: AddForSolid
description: Method that creates a profile containing multiple paths for creating solid features. The paths can include sketch curves as well as text boxes. Individual paths in the returned profile may be deleted to obtain the desired profile.

parameters.Description:
Optional input Boolean that specifies whether to combine the profile paths obtained when this method is used to create a new profile. For instance, let us take the example of a sketch containing two concentric circles. If this argument is specified to be true, the resulting profile will contain 2 profile paths, and the profile path corresponding to the inner circle will have its AddsMaterial flag set to False. Hence, the resulting profile is a circular disc with a circular cut\-out. If the Combine flag is specified to be False, the resulting profile will contain 2 profile paths with the AddsMaterial flag set to True for both paths. If the sketch contains text boxes, then the profile paths corresponding to them will always have the AddsMaterial flag set to True irrespective of whether the Combine flag is specified to be True or False.



This is an optional argument whose default value is True.
parameters.Name: Combine

parameters.Description:
Optional input ObjectCollection that can contain sketch curves as well as text boxes. If sketch curves are specified, then the profile created by this method will include profile paths that are comprised of the exact set of sketch curves specified in the ObjectCollection. If text boxes are specified, then the profile created by this method will include profile paths that correspond to the exact set of text boxes specified in the ObjectCollection. Each text box in the collection will correspond to a unique profile path. If not specified, all the possible profile paths including sketch curves as well as text boxes will be included. This argument is ignored if the Combine argument is specified to be True.



This is an optional argument whose default value is null.
parameters.Name: ProfilePathSegments

parameters.Description:
Optional input Variant reserved for future use. This argument is currently ignored.

This is an optional argument whose default value is null.
parameters.Name: Reserved

name: CreateExtrudeDefinition
description: Method that creates a new ExtrudeDefinition object. The object created does not represent an extrude feature but instead is a representation of the information that defines an extrude feature. You can use this object as input to the ExtrudeFeatures.Add method to create the actual feature.

parameters.Description: Input Profile object that specifies the sketch profile to use for the extrude feature.
parameters.Name: Profile

parameters.Description: Input that specifies the type of operation used to add the feature to the model. Valid inputs are kNewBodyOperation, kJoinOperation, kCutOperation, kIntersectOperation and kSurfaceOperation.
parameters.Name: Operation

name: SetDistanceExtent
description: Method that changes the extents to be “distance” extents. If this method is called on an asymmetric extrude, the second direction extent is removed. To change extent values, use the properties on the object returned by the Extent property.

parameters.Description: Input Variant that defines the length of the extrusion. This can be either a numeric value or a string. A parameter for this value will be created and the supplied string or value is assigned to the parameter. If a value is input, the units are centimeters. If a string is input, the units can be specified as part of the string or it will default to the current length units of the document.
parameters.Name: Distance

parameters.Description: Input constant that indicates which side of the sketch plane to extrude towards. Valid input is kPositiveExtentDirection, kNegativeExtentDirection, or kSymmetricExtentDirection. kPositiveExtentDirection defines the offset direction to be in the same direction as the normal of the sketch plane.
parameters.Name: ExtentDirection

name: SetDistanceExtentTwo
description: Method that sets the second direction extent to be “distance” extents. This method returns an error if the first extent type is not distance extent.

parameters.Description: Input Variant that defines the length of the extrusion in the other direction for an asymmetric extrude. This can be either a numeric value or a string. A parameter for this value will be created and the supplied string or value is assigned to the parameter. If a value is input, the units are centimeters. If a string is input, the units can be specified as part of the string or it will default to the current length units of the document.
parameters.Name: Distance

name: PreMultiplyBy
description: Method that post-multiplies this matrix by the specified matrix, setting this matrix to the result.

parameters.Description: Input Matrix object that specifies the matrix to pre-multiply by.
parameters.Name: Matrix

name: SetToRotation
description: Sets this matrix to the matrix of rotation by the specified angle, through the specified origin, around the specified axis.

parameters.Description: Input Double that specifies the angle of rotation.
parameters.Name: Angle

parameters.Description: Input Vector object.
parameters.Name: Axis

parameters.Description: Input Point object that specifies the origin.
parameters.Name: Center

name: SetTranslation
description: Sets the translation portion of the matrix. If the optional ResetRotation flag is True, the rotation portion of the matrix is reset to identity.

parameters.Description: Input Vector that specifies the new translation portion of the matrix.
parameters.Name: Translation

parameters.Description:
Optional input Boolean that indicates whether to reset to rotation portion of the matrix to identity.

This is an optional argument whose default value is False.
parameters.Name: ResetRotation

name: ExtrudeFeatures
description: Property that returns the collection object. This collection provides access to existing ExtrudeFeature objects and provides functionality to create new ExtrudeFeature objects.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is an ExtrudeFeatures.

name: SaveAs2
description: Saves this document into a file of the specified name.

parameters.Description: Input String value that specifies the full filename of the file to save the document into.
parameters.Name: FullFileName

parameters.Description: Input Boolean that indicates whether the file to be saved is new or is a copy of a previously existing file.
parameters.Name: SaveCopyAs

parameters.Description:
Optional input NameValueMap to specify additional options when save the document. Valid options include: Name = SaveDependents. Value = Boolean that specifies whether or not to save dependent documents that have been dirtied. Defaults to True indicating that the dependents will be saved. If the DependentsToSave argument is not specified, all dirty dependents are saved. If the argument is specified as False, only this document will be saved. The argument is ignored if the document doesn't have any dependents needing save. Name = DocumentsToSave. Value = ObjectCollection that contains the Document objects to save. Use the Document.AllReferencedDocuments property to iterate over all dependent documents and find the ones that need to be saved (i.e. Dirty property returns True). If the SaveDependents argument is True and this argument is not specified, all dirty documents are saved. The argument is ignored if the document doesn't have any dependents needing save.

This is an optional argument whose default value is null.
parameters.Name: Options

name: Add
description: Creates a new of the specified type. Optionally, a template file can be specified instead.

parameters.Description: Input that specifies the type of document to add. If the DocumentType argument is specified to be kDrawingDocumentObject, the method will honor the application option to decide whether to use an idw template or an Inventor DWG template.
parameters.Name: DocumentType

parameters.Description:
Input String that specifies the name of the template file.

This is an optional argument whose default value is "".
parameters.Name: TemplateFileName

parameters.Description:
Optional input Boolean that specifies whether the created document or template is visible.

This is an optional argument whose default value is True.
parameters.Name: CreateVisible

name: Add
description: Method that creates a new User Coordinate System. The newly created UserCoordinateSystem object is returned.

parameters.Description: Input UserCoordinateSystemDefinition object that defines the coordinate system you want to create. A UserCoordinateSystemDefinition object can be created using the UserCoordinateSystems.CreateDefinition method. It can also be obtained from an existing UserCoordinateSystem object.
parameters.Name: Definition

name: Add
description: Method that creates a new sketch based on the input planar entity.

parameters.Description: Input object that defines the planar object the sketch is to be built on. Valid input for this argument includes planar faces and work planes.
parameters.Name: PlanarEntity

parameters.Description:
Optional input Boolean that specifies if sketch geometry should automatically be created for all of the edges of the input face. This is the behavior when creating a sketch interactively in Autodesk Inventor. This argument is ignored in the case when PlanarEntity is a work plane. The default value of False specifies that no sketch geometry should automatically be created from the face edges.

This is an optional argument whose default value is False.
parameters.Name: UseFaceEdges

name: Add
description: Method that creates a new Extrude feature.

parameters.Description: Input ExtrudeDefinition object that defines the extrude feature you want to create. An ExtrudeDefinition object can be created using the ExtrudeFeatures.CreateExtrudeDefinition method. It can also be obtained from an existing ExtrudeFeature object.
parameters.Name: Definition

name: ComponentDefinition
description: Gets the primary ComponentDefinition that resides in this file (housing the BRep and its geometric Feature Constraints).
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a PartComponentDefinition.

name: Features
description: Property that returns the PartFeatures collection object.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a PartFeatures.

name: Sketches
description: Gets the PlanarSketches collection object that encapsulates all of the planar sketches defined in this ComponentDefinition.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a PlanarSketches.

name: UserCoordinateSystems
description: Property that returns the UserCoordinateSystems collection object.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a UserCoordinateSystems.

name: Transformation
description: Gets and puts the transformation matrix.
property_value: This is a read/write property whose value is a Matrix.

name: SketchPoints
description: Property that returns the SketchPoints collection object.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a SketchPoints.

name: Add
description: Method that creates a new sketch point at the specified coordinate.

parameters.Description: Input that defines the position of the sketch point.
parameters.Name: Point

parameters.Description:
Optional input Boolean that specifies if the point is a hole center or not.

This is an optional argument whose default value is True.
parameters.Name: HoleCenter

name: AddByTwoPoints
description: Method that creates a new sketch line based on the two input points. The new sketch line is returned.

parameters.Description: Input object that defines the start point of the line. This can be either a Point2d object defining an x-y point in space, or an existing SketchPoint object. If an existing sketch point is input, that point becomes the line's start point.
parameters.Name: StartPoint

parameters.Description: Input object that defines the end point of the line. This can be either a Point2d object defining an x-y point in space, or an existing SketchPoint object. If an existing sketch point is input, that point becomes the line's end point.
parameters.Name: EndPoint

name: AddByThreePoints
description: Method that creates a new sketch arc that passes through the three input points.

parameters.Description: Input object that defines the start point. This can be either a SketchPoint or Point2d object. In the case where a SketchPoint object is input, that start point of the arc will be attached to the sketch point.
parameters.Name: StartPoint

parameters.Description: Input Point2d object that defines a point along the arc.
parameters.Name: MidPoint

parameters.Description: Input object that defines the end point. This can be either a SketchPoint or Point2d object. In the case where a SketchPoint object is input, that end point of the arc will be attached to the sketch point.
parameters.Name: EndPoint

name: AddByCenterRadius
description: Method that creates a new sketch circle at a specified location and radius.

parameters.Description: Input object that defines the center point. This can be either a SketchPoint or Point2d object. In the case where a SketchPoint object is input, the circle will be attached to the point.
parameters.Name: CenterPoint

parameters.Description: Input Double that defines the radius of the circle in centimeters.
parameters.Name: Radius

name: AddAsThreePointRectangle
description: Method that creates four lines to represent a rectangle where the base of the rectangle is defined by two points and the height is defined by a third point. The input points for the base can be either Point2d objects defining an X-Y point in space, or an existing SketchPoint object.

parameters.Description: Input object that defines the first base point of the rectangle. Either a SketchPoint or Point2d object can be used. If an existing sketch point is input, that lines become connected to the point.
parameters.Name: BasePointOne

parameters.Description: Input object that defines the second base point of the rectangle. Either a SketchPoint or Point2d object can be used. If an existing sketch point is input, the lines become connected to the point.
parameters.Name: BasePointTwo

parameters.Description: Input Point2d object that defines the height of the rectangle. The point can be anywhere in space and the height of the rectangle is computed by finding the shortest distance of this point to an infinite line defined by the two base points.
parameters.Name: HeightPoint

name: DocumentTypeEnum
description: Document Types.

name: PartFeatureOperationEnum
description: Constants identifying the type of Boolean operation to be performed during this feature placement.

name: PartFeatureExtentDirectionEnum
description: Constants identifying the direction in which a feature extension needs to take place.
values: 20995  # Extension in positive AND negative direction.

name: Mass
description: Gets and sets the mass of the model in database units.
property_value: This is a read/write property whose value is a Double.

name: Open
description: Property that returns whether this document is currently open. If False, the document has only been initialized and calling methods or properties on the document could cause it to open.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a Boolean.

name: MassProperties
description: Mass properties for this ComponentDefinition.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a MassProperties.

name: Volume
description: Gets and sets the volume of the model in database units.
property_value: This is a read/write property whose value is a Double.

name: CenterOfMass
description: Property that gets the center of mass.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a Point.

name: PrincipalMomentsOfInertia
description: Property that gets the moments of inertia about the principal axis.

parameters.Description: Output Double that specifies the first moment of inertia.
parameters.Name: I1

parameters.Description: Output Double that specifies the second moment of inertia.
parameters.Name: I2

parameters.Description: Output Double that specifies the third moment of inertia.
parameters.Name: I3

name: Accuracy
description: Read-write property that gets/sets the desired level of computational accuracy of the mass property calculations.
property_value: This is a read/write property whose value is a MassPropertiesAccuracyEnum.

name: XYZMomentsOfInertia
description: Method that gets the moments of inertia about the reference axis with the center of gravity as origin.

parameters.Description: Output Double that returns the XX partial moment.
parameters.Name: Ixx

parameters.Description: Output Double that returns the YY partial moment.
parameters.Name: Iyy

parameters.Description: Output Double that returns the ZZ partial moment.
parameters.Name: Izz

parameters.Description: Output Double that returns the XY partial moment.
parameters.Name: Ixy

parameters.Description: Output Double that returns the YZ partial moment.
parameters.Name: Iyz

parameters.Description: Output Double that returns the XZ partial moment.
parameters.Name: Ixz

name: RotationToPrincipal
description: Gets the rotation from the active edit coordinate system of the target to the principal coordinate system.

parameters.Description: Output the rotation angle in radian along X axis.
parameters.Name: Rx

parameters.Description: Output the rotation angle in radian along Y axis.
parameters.Name: Ry

parameters.Description: Output the rotation angle in radian along Z axis.
parameters.Name: Rz

name: Area
description: Property that returns the area of the entity.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a Double.
